name: projectile
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (dispatch key 'physics.projectile'; 3-arg). Deterministic pure compute: full projectile solution (ToF/range/apex/impact + launch components) from v0/angleDeg/h0/g. Drives PhysicsActionPanel.actProj + PhysicsWorkbench.ProjectileTab; component renders range_m/maxHeight_m/timeOfFlight_s/timeToApex_s/impactSpeed_mps/v0x_mps/v0y_mps. Validation: v0<=0 or angleDeg outside 0..90 → ok:false. POISON fail-CLOSED: Number.isFinite guards each input, so '1e999'/'NaN' are rejected (no Infinity range). Not assassin-driven (LENS_ACTIONS); authored spec pinned by server/tests/physics-lens-macros.test.js.
